Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  sseq2d Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem sseq2d 3968
Description: An equality deduction for the subclass relationship. (Contributed by NM, 14-Aug-1994.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
sseq1d.1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐵)
Assertion
Ref Expression
sseq2d ⊢ (𝜑 → (𝐶 ⊆ 𝐴 ↔ 𝐶 ⊆ 𝐵))
Proof of Theorem sseq2d
StepHypRef Expression
1 sseq1d.1 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐵)
2 sseq2 3962 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → (𝐶 ⊆ 𝐴 ↔ 𝐶 ⊆ 𝐵))
31, 2syl 17 1 ⊢ (𝜑 → (𝐶 ⊆ 𝐴 ↔ 𝐶 ⊆ 𝐵))
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   ↔ wb 208   = wceq 1560   ⊆ wss 3904
This theorem was proved from axioms:  ax-mp 5  ax-1 6  ax-2 7  ax-3 8  ax-gen 1815  ax-4 1829  ax-5 1930  ax-6 1987  ax-7 2028  ax-9 2152  ax-ext 2734
This theorem depends on definitions:  df-bi 209  df-an 400  df-ex 1800  df-cleq 2754  df-ss 3921
